reasoning: The control SC-7(11) focuses on restricting incoming communications traffic, which directly maps to Kubernetes NetworkPolicies and service configurations. NetworkPolicies can enforce a default deny-all ingress policy and allow only specific traffic, similar to cloud security groups and NACLs. Additionally, restricting the use of LoadBalancer services and ensuring TLS is enabled for Ingress resources aligns with the control's intent to protect boundaries.
